nodes.label: AI as collaborative assistant for planning and creation
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous delegator without human input
nodes.grounding_span: i do not delegate complete tasks to AI

nodes.label: AI ability to incorporate human nuance and adaptability
nodes.label_negative: AI lack of human nuance for child-specific needs
nodes.grounding_span: AI lack human nuance necesary for working with very young children and requiring constant pivots and adaptation

nodes.label: AI as source of new ideas and research
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful or irrelevant suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: discover new initiatives through the references it provides

nodes.label: AI support for individualized child care
nodes.grounding_span: it has allowed me to treat each one of them in my care as unique individuals

nodes.label: Child development and well-being
nodes.grounding_span: blending what children need for their emotional development with what they need for basic function

nodes.label: Professional effectiveness and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: i use AI to stay in line with recent research

nodes.label: Authentic human connection and attachment
nodes.grounding_span: The connection and relationship that i develop with the children is my most valuable resource

nodes.label: Trust in AI as collaborative partner but not autonomous
nodes.grounding_span: i do not trust AI to handle tasks entirely alone without my collaboration or continual input

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for individualized planning
nodes.grounding_span: AI has been particularly helpful in managing the needs of individual children

nodes.label: Concern about over-reliance on AI without human collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: My concern are those who may over use it without collaboration

nodes.label: Iterative co-creation with detailed prompts and feedback
nodes.grounding_span: i usually start by giving the model as much detail as possible about what i am searching for

nodes.label: Individualized tailoring based on child-specific needs
nodes.grounding_span: i make one for each child based on their needs and development
